gist.headline: CatGPT gets its selfie back
gist.blurb: We fixed a missing image link that was causing CatGPT's avatar comics to fail. The feline selfies are back online, complete with a shiny new backup!
gist.summary: Updated the reference URL for CatGPT's selfie placeholder and added a durable backup image to fix failing avatar comic generations.
gist.impact: CatGPT users will once again see properly generated avatar comics instead of broken images.
gist.visual_concept: CatGPT taking a selfie. A cute pixel art cat holding up a phone or camera, with Polly the bee helping out by posing in the background or holding a tiny picture frame.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute cat taking a selfie with a smartphone, while the bee mascot hovers nearby posing for the photo. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute cat taking a selfie with a smartphone, while the bee mascot hovers nearby posing for the photo. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
